queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the association between savings balances below 100 DM and reduced credit default probability.

queries.feature_definition: Credit amount requested by the applicant.
queries.question: Determinants of credit risk mitigation associated with the requested credit amount.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: no known savings account.
queries.question: Statistical evidence regarding the influence of no known savings account status on creditworthiness.
